_comment: Autonomous post+repost decision-maker (src/triggers/ai_manager.py), retargeted to a slower, fixed 4-6 posts/day cadence rather than a high-volume feed -- min_hours_between_calls plus max_posts_per_day bound it to roughly that range even though the workflow itself runs hourly. Replies now run separately/faster in config/reply_manager.json + src/triggers/reply_manager.py. fallback_link_url is used when a post has no image available (OPENAI_API_KEY unset, or generation failed) -- e.g. the public Telegram channel link; leave blank to just post without a link/image in that case rather than blocking the post entirely.
